name: Obstacle Remover
description: Remove one obstacle cell from the board before the stage starts.

name: Node Pair Eraser
description: Remove one node pair from the board before the stage starts.

name: Hint
description: Reveals one valid connection path on the board.

name: Undo
description: Reverts the last move made on the board.

name: Paint
description: Changes the color of any one node on the board.

name: Hammer
description: Removes one obstacle or gimmick cell instantly during play.

name: Shuffle
description: Reshuffles all unconnected nodes on the board.
